lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has multiple dents and significant paint damage. The interior upholstery is heavily worn and stained. Mechanical systems require significant repair, and the engine has a noticeable leak.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and stained carpets. The mechanical systems require major repairs to be fully functional.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning vehicle in absolute showroom condition! It has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard, looking and driving just like new. From its flawless paint to its pristine interior, every detail reflects the care it has received. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly exceptional car that's ready for its next proud owner!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish with zero scratches, dents, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all interior surfaces are immaculate. Every electronic feature and safety system functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been meticulously maintained and garage-kept its entire life. Buyers can expect a smooth, quiet ride and the peace of mind that comes with a vehicle that has been cared for with the highest standards. It is truly a collector-grade example.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the roof and hood, along with various small scratches and a few minor door dings consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is intact but the upholstery shows noticeable wear, particularly on the driver's seat, and the carpets have some staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are operational, but the car will soon require routine maintenance, specifically new brake pads and a fresh set of tires. While it is not a showpiece, it remains a solid choice for someone looking for basic transportation who is comfortable with some cosmetic imperfections and upcoming minor service needs.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner who values both reliability and value.

Hey everyone! I’m selling my trusty car and it's looking for a brand new home! It’s been so reliable and is still in great shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. I've taken really good care of it, and it drives like a dream. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this go to a great owner!

Offering a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. The suspension has been refreshed with polyurethane bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers for precise turn-in. While it displays minor aesthetic wear commensurate with enthusiast use, the powertrain remains tight with excellent compression and a linear power band across the entire rev range.
Reliable daily driver. Solid mechanical condition. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Ready for pickup.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for daily driver that balances performance with comfort. The exterior finish presents beautifully, retaining a deep luster with only the slight, honest character marks consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and strictly smoke-free; the upholstery is supple, and all power features, infotainment, and climate controls operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust, benefiting from a consistent service history that ensures a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. With plenty of tread on the tires and firm braking, this car is ready for the road immediately. It is a solid, dependable vehicle maintained with a detail-oriented approach, offering a premium experience for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. A superior selection for those who demand excellence and proven value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated driving experience. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. An exceptional value for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and is still in really solid shape, making it the perfect dependable ride for your daily commutes or weekend adventures! It runs smoothly and is ready for its next chapter with a new owner. I'd love for you to come by, take it for a spin, and see how great it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for exceptional throttle response. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained with a focus on mechanical longevity, including proactive rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under lateral load. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the powertrain remains tight, and the suspension geometry is sharpened by refreshed bushings and high-performance dampers. A mechanically robust specimen ready for the curves.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, ready for its next chapter. The exterior features a lustrous finish that still catches the light beautifully, with only the minor, expected signs of road use that come with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin offers a premium experience; the upholstery is clean and supple, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, reflecting a consistent service history and proactive care. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, planted ride. This is a reliable, high-performing car that balances luxury with everyday practicality. It has been smoke-free, garage-kept, and is mechanically sound, offering the perfect opportunity for a buyer seeking quality and longevity without the new-car price tag.

Presented in exemplary mechanical and aesthetic condition, this vehicle has been curated for the professional driver who demands reliability without compromise. It exhibits a well-documented history of consistent maintenance and remains a steadfast example of automotive excellence. We invite you to experience a machine that balances sophisticated engineering with proven durability, offered at a competitive valuation for its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits a consistent history of mechanical care and remains in commendable condition, offering both reliability and a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. We invite you to acquire this distinguished vehicle at a competitive valuation that reflects its enduring quality and proven roadworthiness.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? This car is in great shape and ready for its next adventure! It runs smoothly and has plenty of life left in it. I've taken really good care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. It's perfect for daily commutes or weekend trips—come take it for a spin!

This high-revving powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio to deliver linear power up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Power is routed through a precise 6-speed manual transmission
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear only. Drives well.

Presenting a meticulously cared-for vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by well-maintained alloy wheels and only minor, inconspicuous stone chips consistent with careful highway driving. Step inside to a spacious, non-smoking cabin where the upholstery remains plush and supportive, and the dashboard is free of any cracks or sun damage. Every feature, from the responsive dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is quiet and responsive, benefiting from a consistent maintenance schedule that ensures a smooth, confident ride. This car has been a reliable companion and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any necessary repairs. It represents an excellent value for a buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable vehicle that still looks and drives beautifully.
